title: cenchrus multiflorus
intro: Cenchrus multiflorus, also known as the buffalo grass or dune grass, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical Africa, Asia, and the Middle East. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, exhibiting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cenchrus multiflorus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Cenchrus multiflorus can be made into a decoction or infusion, often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of benefits and applications.
